case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. MERCEDES JOHNSON ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, MERCEDES $3,469.91 PRINCIPAL, $432.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,901.91, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100192002)
DECLARATION REGARDING NONMILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 100192002) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 68122637) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
DECLARATION RE: VENUE (TRANSACTION ID # 68122637) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $432.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100192002) AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, MERCEDES
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100192002) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 5, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION AFFIDAVIT IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT CCP 585 (D) (TRANSACTION ID # 100192002) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 68122637) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, MERCEDES DOES 1 THROUGH 5, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-20-2023
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY REGARDING NONMILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 68122637) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 68122637) TO PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100190356), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. SERVED JAN-04-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, MERCEDES
